name: Manhattan (L1) distance
task: Create /tmp/eval_man/man.py with manhattan(a, b) returning sum(|a_i - b_i|). Raise ValueError on length mismatch.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_man/man.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); M = mod.manhattan; assert M([1,2,3],[4,6,8]) == 12; assert M([0],[0]) == 0; assert M([5],[5]) == 0; print('OK')
